strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput microservices
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform demonstrating end-to-end product ownership
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML platform leadership or recognized AI products at the scale expected for a Principal/Director IC
Career titles top out at Staff/Senior; lacks Principal or Director-level strategic advisory track record
No Master's/PhD in AI and limited evidence of advising strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption

key_factors.factor: Breadth of full-stack and infrastructure engineering tenure

response.justification: The candidate brings a long, varied engineering career with strong craftsmanship, open-source founding experience, and recent hands-on work with AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks. However, the role targets a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, built AI products at scale, and strategic customer advisory experience — areas where the resume shows emerging rather than established depth. Fit is partial: strong builder credentials, lighter on the AI-strategy and principal-level influence the role emphasizes.
